title: erigeron neocaledonicus
intro: Erigeron neocaledonicus, also known as the New Caledonian Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and preventing the development of infections. Herbal preparations of Erigeron neocaledonicus can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
